conversation.user.created.description: Triggered when a user starts a new conversation

conversation.user.replied.description: Triggered when a user replies to a conversation

conversation.admin.replied.description: Triggered when an admin or teammate replies to a conversation

conversation.admin.closed.description: Triggered when an admin closes a conversation

conversation.admin.opened.description: Triggered when an admin opens a conversation (marks it as open)

conversation.admin.assigned.description: Triggered when a conversation is assigned to an admin or team

conversation.admin.noted.description: Triggered when an admin adds an internal note to a conversation

conversation.admin.snoozed.description: Triggered when an admin snoozes a conversation to resurface later

conversation.rating.added.description: Triggered when a user rates a conversation

conversation.priority.updated.description: Triggered when the priority of a conversation is changed

contact.user.created.description: Triggered when a new user contact is created

contact.lead.created.description: Triggered when a new lead contact is created

contact.lead.signed_up.description: Triggered when a lead contact converts to a user by signing up

contact.deleted.description: Triggered when a contact is deleted

contact.email.updated.description: Triggered when a contact's email address is updated

contact.user.tag.created.description: Triggered when a tag is added to a contact

contact.user.tag.deleted.description: Triggered when a tag is removed from a contact

company.created.description: Triggered when a new company is created

ticket.created.description: Triggered when a new ticket is created

ticket.state.updated.description: Triggered when a ticket's state changes (e.g. open to resolved)

type.description: The type of the payload, always 'notification_event'

id.description: Unique identifier for this notification event

app_id.description: The Intercom app ID that received the webhook

topic.description: The topic name that identifies the event type (e.g. conversation.user.created, contact.deleted)

created_at.description: Unix timestamp of when the event was created

delivery_status.description: The delivery status of this webhook notification (e.g. pending, retry)

delivery_attempts.description: The number of delivery attempts made for this notification

data.description: The event data wrapper containing 'type' and 'item'. The 'item' field holds the full resource object (conversation, contact, company, or ticket) with all its properties

first_sent_at.description: Unix timestamp of when this notification was first sent

self.description: URL to this notification event resource in the Intercom API
